metadata.description: usage-trace marketplace: install plugin then ask 分析当前项目的 orderId (字段使用情况 / 调用链).

plugins.name: usage-trace
plugins.description: Trace keyword usage, call chains, and database tables in Java/Spring, Python, or C# with an offline HTML report. Auto-trigger for prompts like 分析当前项目的 orderId, 查找字段使用情况, 追踪调用链, 字段流向.
